message:
chore(beads): deep plan-space review of alien epic — 24 beads refined, 2 new test beads

Synthesized findings from 3 parallel review agents (A.1-B.3, C.1-D.3, E.1-I.3).

Structural fixes:
- Remove false dependency C.3→C.2 (C.3 only needs C.1 generators)
- Add correct dependency C.3→C.1 (enables parallel work on C.2 and C.3)
- Fix C.2 title: remove "event ring buffer" reference (no ring buffer tests exist)
- Create J.1: E2E alien enhancement integration test suite (br-hl5tk)
- Create J.2: Regression safety gate for alien enhancements (br-nve1u)
- Wire J.1 and J.2 into alien epic

Critical review findings applied via --notes on all 24 task beads:
- A.1: Must add remove() method, CachePolicy trait, clarify Location enum
- A.2: Dual-index lock ordering hazard, on_evict callback gap with A.1
- B.1: Critical path for 4+ downstream beads, add concurrent/eviction tests
- B.2: Scope down to 3 implementable decision points (3 of 5 don't exist)
- C.1: Fix model naming (ProjectRow vs Project), cover all AgentRow fields
- C.2: placeholders() is private (blocker), fix test naming
- C.3: Fix missing add_reply_prefix(), add Unicode/zero-area tests
- D.1: Specify alpha default, add numerical stability tests
- D.2: Expand from 4 to 8 tests, add integration specifics and file paths
- D.3: Mark conformal test as conditional, fix golden test fragility
- E.1/E.2: Add eviction-under-sharding and poisoned-mutex tests
- F.1: Clarify FocusRingCache ownership, RefCell thread safety warning
- G.1: Clarify variance model, justify BOCPD over simpler alternatives
- G.2: Add window reset mechanism, Cauchy test tolerance, negative clamp
- G.3: Add file paths, function signatures, rate limiting for anomaly cards
- H.1: Add empty entries handling, insufficient-data fallback
- H.2: Add file paths, keyboard nav state machine, 3 additional tests
- I.1: Add race condition and cycle consistency tests
- I.2: Document LOW user benefit, clean up LIKE section confusion
- I.3: Add MAX_IN_CLAUSE_ITEMS overflow check, column alias test

Graph validation: 0 cycles, 13 ready, 23 blocked, 36 total, 0 alerts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
